name: Operation Tidewatch
brief: A nation-state APT has gained an initial foothold in the OT network of a regional power utility via a phishing campaign targeting IT helpdesk staff and an unpatched VPN appliance (CVE-2023-46805). Threat intel indicates pre-positioning near SCADA historian and HMI nodes. Blue Team must evict the actor and restore integrity before adversary achieves Stage 7 (ICS impact).
blue_objectives: Preserve grid uptime — no load-shedding events
Evict APT actor from OT network
Identify and close initial access vector
red_posture: APT-X holds persistence on jump host (JH-01) via scheduled task, has read access to historian (HIS-01), and is staging lateral movement tooling toward HMI-01. Detection confidence: low. Escalation authority: stage 6.
